title: Authority baseline and row-count freeze
notes: Read-only verification across canonical CSV/YAML and generated manifest; runs the coverage gate.

title: Strict row coverage ledger generation
notes: Generator writes one 2617-row CSV (~1.5 MB) under execution_plan artifacts; idempotent.

title: No-grey failing gates for incomplete rows
notes: Static gate reads STRICT_ROW_COVERAGE_LEDGER.csv and ROW_STATE_CONTRACT.csv; fails by design at baseline.

title: Native-future promotion matrix
notes: Generator writes one 911-row CSV (~713 KB).

title: Function semantic oracle matrix
notes: Generator joins canonical surface registry with two YAML authority files; writes one 1534-row CSV (~1.35 MB).

title: Authenticated full-route matrix
notes: Generator writes one 2617-row CSV (~5.5 MB) with full route declarations including MGA/no-WAL invariant per row.

title: SBLR binary round-trip matrix
notes: Generator joins surface registry with oracle matrix; writes one 2617-row CSV (~4.27 MB) with per-row 9-phase round-trip expectation.

title: No-stub source and fixture integrity gate
notes: Static scanner over execution_plan-owned source/fixture scope; passes baseline cleanly.

title: Agent heartbeat and recovery controls
notes: CLI module + CTest gate; baseline validate run reads AGENT_STATUS/WRITE_SCOPE/TRACKER and reports zero errors.

title: Resume state and interruption recovery manifest
notes: Documentation/manifest-only slice.

title: Per-row evidence manifest
notes: Generator joins surface registry with four prior matrices; writes one 2617-row CSV (~2.43 MB).

title: Status-change authority gate
notes: Generator writes 9-row matrix CSV; gate reads canonical registry + 6 execution_plan artifacts and verifies per-row status agreement.

title: Deterministic generation and no-network gate
notes: Gate regenerates the generated registry and differential replay fixtures in isolated work directories; compares tracked artifacts and performs static no-network scan.

title: Performance and resource budget matrix
notes: Generator writes a fixed-row matrix declaring budgets per slice/gate.

title: Failure triage taxonomy
notes: Coordinator-authored taxonomy CSV; expected to be small (<50 row) and quick to generate.

title: Numeric math cast comparison and bitwise functions
notes: Implementation slice: function code + descriptor enrichment + fixture authoring + CTest runs across multiple operands.

notes: Implementation slice: function code + descriptor enrichment + fixture authoring + collation/charset variants.

notes: Implementation slice: temporal + timezone + UUID + session/security context functions.

notes: Implementation slice: spatial/vector/search/fuzzy/phonetic and exact refusals for policy-blocked surfaces.

title: Aggregate ordered-set approximate and window functions
notes: Implementation slice: aggregate + window + ordered-set + approximate.

title: Procedural diagnostic cursor and PSQL expression functions
notes: Implementation slice: procedural + diagnostic + cursor + PSQL expression forms.

title: DDL catalog schema name synonym domain table index rows
notes: Large implementation slice: catalog object lifecycle through MGA transactions; UUID identity preserved across reboot.

title: DML query merge upsert copy and bulk rows
notes: DML + bulk + COPY through MGA copy-on-write; no WAL recovery path.

title: Transaction MGA lock savepoint and visibility rows
notes: MGA transaction lifecycle; no-WAL gates must pass; multi-session visibility tests required.

title: Security auth policy audit and redaction rows
notes: Engine-authority security; redaction; constant-time refusal.

title: Observability management jobs storage archive and replication rows
notes: Management + metrics + jobs + filespace + backup/restore/archive/replication; MGA-derived backup-forward delta only, no WAL.

title: Cluster-private public fail-closed and private-profile rows
notes: Public-fail-closed coverage for 37 cluster_private rows; private-profile evidence is private cluster scope and outside this matrix.

title: Catalog bootstrap upgrade and UUID seed closure
notes: Database create transaction 1 + first-open transaction 2 + restart + upgrade tests; MGA transaction lifecycle authority.

title: Exact SBLR lowering and verifier closure
notes: Every accepted row lowers to exact operation/function id; verifier rejects SQL text/names/family-only routing.

title: Server admission and parser-support UDR route closure
notes: SBPS server admission + parser-support UDR dynamic SQL route; engine authority enforced.

title: Exhaustive per-row regression publication
notes: Full per-row regression suite; sharded CTest runs; failure reports retained.

title: Reference alias compatibility regression
notes: Reference alias revalidation across families post-SBsql promotion.

title: Driver and client authenticated route smoke coverage
notes: Driver/client smoke through sb_isql + at least one maintained driver lane over SBWP/TLS.
